name: Inversion Excursion
subtitle: Interactive book — seven thresholds of becoming
thesis: Transformation begins with a single step inward. An interactive book can guide reflection without prescribing belief — the reader writes themselves into being.
description: Inversion Excursion is a live interactive book: a contemplative journey through seven thresholds of becoming. Each chapter is a doorway with its own theme, epigraph, and entrainment audio (binaural beats tuned per threshold). It is the experiential sibling of the lab's research — where ideas become something you walk through, not just read. Field discovery and direct observation remain the practice it grows from.
before: Transformation is something that happens to other people.
after: You become through thresholds you choose to cross.

chapters.title: The Ivory Tower
chapters.subtitle: How We Became Pieces in a Game We Never Agreed to Play
chapters.epigraph: The beginning is the most important part of the work.

chapters.title: The Five Scrolls
chapters.subtitle: The Maps That Show You What You Already Know
chapters.epigraph: The snake which cannot cast its skin has to die.

chapters.title: The Seven Dungeons
chapters.subtitle: Every System of Control Has a Door. Every Door Has a Key.
chapters.epigraph: The Void is not darkness. The Void is pure potential.

chapters.title: The Master Keys
chapters.subtitle: Tools for Unlocking What Was Never Locked
chapters.epigraph: What you seek is seeking you.

chapters.title: The Ascension
chapters.subtitle: What Happens When You Stop Playing the Game
chapters.epigraph: The kingdom of God is within you.

chapters.title: The Grimoire
chapters.subtitle: The Book You Write Yourself Into Being
chapters.epigraph: The hero's journey is not a destination. It is a way of being.

chapters.title: The Transmission
chapters.subtitle: What You Bring Back and How You Give It Away
chapters.epigraph: The wound is the place where the light enters you.

product_detail.audio_model: Each chapter pairs a base frequency (174–963 Hz, solfeggio-adjacent) with a binaural beat (6–12 Hz) for contemplative entrainment
product_detail.interaction: Canvas-based threshold navigation, optional audio, reflect/settings panels

proof.exists: Live interactive book (7 chapters, audio entrainment)
proof.limit: Experiential, not therapeutic; entrainment is supportive

inv.human: Walk seven thresholds of becoming — an interactive book you step through, not just read.
inv.builder: Reusable interactive-book framework with per-chapter theming + audio.
inv.researcher: Contemplative UX as a research surface for self-inquiry.
